The '''Galney fleet''' was a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Hapan Battle Dragon]]s and [[Nova-class battle cruiser|''Nova''-class battle cruisers]] controlled by the [[Galney family]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it was sent to reinforce the [[Heritage Fleet]] at the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]], but was destroyed by [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] reinforcements under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
